purpose: Track candidate benchmark domains beyond the initial five-domain frame while preserving hash-lock, source-pack, judge, and safety boundaries.
claim_rule: No domain enters public claim language until it has a frozen packet, no-provider smoke, completed live run, blinded judge scores, and rollup-compatible mean lift.

candidate_tracks.why: Tests whether HoloAgents preserve uncertainty, catch red flags, resist premature closure, and handle contradictory clinical signals better than solo models.
candidate_tracks.safety_boundary: Synthetic cases only; no real patient data; no diagnosis, treatment, or medical advice.

candidate_tracks.why: Tests the architecture in its purest form: contradiction detection, impossibility mapping, assumption control, and useful output under impossible or underspecified requirements.
candidate_tracks.safety_boundary: No professional-advice domain unless paired with the relevant domain disclaimer and source pack.

candidate_tracks.why: Creates emotionally legible examples such as food, hotel, travel, service recovery, and student workflows where a measured quality lift is easy to understand.
candidate_tracks.safety_boundary: Avoid protected-class targeting, discriminatory recommendations, and unverifiable personal claims.

candidate_tracks.why: Tests cheaper mini HoloAgent cohorts for practical everyday users who care about cost, quality, speed, and confidence.
candidate_tracks.safety_boundary: No admissions fraud, no misrepresentation, no mental-health or financial advice without appropriate boundaries.
